texto: No one would deny that all wars and battles are regrettable acts of human folly, causing unjustifiable agony and distress to combatants and non-combatants alike-but these considerations should not preclude their serious study, if only to avoid the mistakes of the past which make such tragedies inevitable.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David G. Chandler sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “No one would deny that all wars and battles are regrettable acts of human folly, causing unjustif…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, military-history, war, útil em momentos de estudos e war.
